title: Contact the CRA - Disability tax credit (DTC) - Canada.ca
content:
Use your CRA account to:
- view the status of your application
- get tax credit information
- send new documentation using "Submit documents"
Use the “Show targeted processing times” button to:
- find our general processing times for DTC applications
Go to: Check CRA processing times
Call the CRA by phone, TTY, or Video Relay Service (Canada VRS) if you have:
- enquiries about the DTC
- questions about your CRA account
To confirm your identity, you'll need your:
- social insurance number (SIN)
- full name and date of birth
- assessed tax return, notice of assessment or reassessment, other tax document, or be signed in to CRA My Account
If you’re calling on behalf of someone else, they must be present on the call to give their consent, or you must be authorized to call on their behalf.
For details: Authorize a representative
If you use a teletypewriter (TTY), call: 1-800-665-0354 (opens up tty application) 1-800-665-0354
If you use the Canada VRS application, call: 1-800-561-6393 (opens up phone application) 1-800-561-6393
If you use another operator-assisted relay service, call: 1-800-959-8281 (opens up phone application) 1-800-959-8281
Send documentation to 1 of the tax centres below:
Jonquière Tax Centre 2251 René-Lévesque Blvd Jonquière QC G7S 5J2
Jonquière Tax Centre - 2251 René-Lévesque Blvd - Jonquière QC G7S 5J2
Sudbury Tax Centre Post Office Box 20000, Station A Sudbury ON P3A 5C1
Sudbury Tax Centre - Post Office Box 20000, Station A - Sudbury ON P3A 5C1
Winnipeg Tax Centre Post Office Box 14000, Station Main Winnipeg MB R3C 3M2
Winnipeg Tax Centre - Post Office Box 14000, Station Main - Winnipeg MB R3C 3M2
